title: SMP Craft
description: This is the best and most optimized minecraft modpack for your minecraft smp!
body:
# SMP Craft
This is the best and most optimized minecraft modpack for your smp server. It has all the features you need for recording and playing:
- replay  mod
- shaders
- simple voicechat

![This is our Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42634fc919b18bc5818ec33b3effaad2e0aceec0.jpeg)

We hope you like this modpack!
